items.title: Advice to developers: make software that agents want, with API-first design, as AI agents, instead of humans, will become the primary users of future software (Aaron Levie/@levie)
items.title_en: Advice to developers: make software that agents want, with API-first design, as AI agents, instead of humans, will become the primary users of future software (Aaron Levie/@levie)
items.title_zh: 给开发人员的建议：通过 API 优先设计，制作智能体想要的软件，因为人工智能智能体将取代人类，成为未来软件的主要用户 (Aaron Levie/@levie)
